_units: weight in A, tau in s, delay in s
_role: Slow excitation from E neurons onto I (matched timescale with I→E)
_design: tau_s ~ 100 ms — comparable to MSN τ_open (~100 ms) and to the I→E inhibitory cascade, much slower than intrinsic self-E (~5 ms thyristor close). At this tau the cascade integrates over several E spikes; weight chosen so the integrated drive comfortably pushes I above its rheobase at E rates of a few Hz.
